scripts.build:safe: npm run rules:build && npm run rules:check && ng build
scripts.validate:local: npm run rules:build && npm run rules:check && npm run functions:build && npm run build:emu
scripts.validate:prod: npm run appcheck:prod:check && npm run rules:build && npm run rules:check && npm run functions:build && npm run build:prod && npm run audit:prod
scripts.appcheck:prod:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('src/environments/environment.prod.ts','utf8');const bad=['prod-recaptcha-v3-site-key','staging-recaptcha-v3-site-key','dev-recaptcha-v3-site-key'];if(bad.some(v=>s.includes(v))){console.error('App Check de produção ainda usa siteKey placeholder. Troque por uma chave real do reCAPTCHA v3.');process.exit(1)}console.log('App Check de produção: siteKey não placeholder.');"
scripts.test:rules: npm run rules:build && npm run rules:check && firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.rules-test.json --only firestore --project demo-entretenimento-rules "vitest run --config vitest.rules.config.ts --reporter=verbose"
scripts.test:media:e2e: npm run rules:build && npm run rules:check && npm run functions:build && firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.media-e2e.json --only auth,firestore,storage,functions --project demo-entretenimento-media-e2e "node scripts/tests/photo-publication.e2e.mjs"
scripts.test:media:video:e2e: npm run rules:build && npm run rules:check && npm run functions:build && node scripts/tests/run-video-publication-e2e.mjs
scripts.test:compliance:age:e2e: npm run rules:build && npm run rules:check && npm run functions:build && node scripts/tests/run-profile-age-reverification-e2e.mjs
scripts.seed:room-access:emu: set FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080&& set FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099&& set FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=entretenimento-sexual&& node scripts/dev/seed-room-access.mjs
scripts.deploy:rules: npm run rules:build && npm run rules:check && firebase deploy --only firestore:rules
scripts.deploy:rules:project: npm run rules:build && npm run rules:check && firebase deploy --only firestore:rules --project entretenimento-sexual
scripts.deploy:firestore: npm run rules:build && npm run rules:check && firebase deploy --only firestore:rules,firestore:indexes --project entretenimento-sexual
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run validate:prod && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes,storage,functions --project entretenimento-sexual
scripts.audit:prod: npm run audit:root:prod && npm run functions:audit:prod
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:root:all && npm run functions:audit:all
